title: Software Engineer
description: Build production software for job discovery, candidate workflows, search, and recruiter productivity tools.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Own high-quality software systems for a technology recruiting marketplace, including search, recommendations, and job data pipelines.

title: Lead iOS Engineer

description: Build matching, scoring, and recommendation systems for remote recruiting products with privacy-first data handling.

title: SwiftUI Engineer

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Design scalable APIs, event pipelines, and search services for a high-traffic recruitment marketplace.

title: Android Developer
description: Ship candidate-facing Android features with Kotlin, Compose, API integrations, and reliable release practices.

title: Product Designer
description: Design recruiter workflows, job discovery surfaces, and accessible mobile experiences for technology hiring.

title: Mobile Engineer
description: Build mobile job discovery experiences across native iOS and Android surfaces for a US-based technology hiring platform.
